title: CSIR CEERI Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 22 Technical Officer, Technician Posts
description: The CSIR-Central Electronics Engineering Research Institute (CSIR CEERI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 22 Technical Officer and Technician posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their 10th pass, ITI, B.E./B. Tech in Electrical, Electronics Engineering, M.Sc., MCA can apply for the CSIR CEERI Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply...
